title: Eva Airing On Toonami
wikitext:
[]: Eva Airing On Toonami             Quote Post by CJD » Wed Jul 31, 2013 11:21 am Source That's Toonami's official tumblr. They did a Q&A today and that was one of the details that came out of it. Time to be announced #hype #(foramovieI'veseendozensoftimesalready)

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Jul 31, 2013 11:26 am yayyy. It's great that more people get a chance to watch Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jul 31, 2013 3:05 pm Wonderful news! Coincidentally, my Japanese imported copies of 1.11, 2.22, and 3.33 arrived today! The Chinese should make this the year of Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 31, 2013 3:08 pm Here's the source on Crunchy Roll: http://www.crunchyroll.com/anime-news/2013/07/31/toonami-to-air-evangelion-222-in-august Pretty cool news. Oh yeah, news post made: http://www.evageeks.org/2013/07/eva-2-22-to-air-on-toonami/

[]:             Quote Post by WunderBah » Wed Jul 31, 2013 3:43 pm My body is ready!

[]:             Quote Post by Ænimal » Wed Jul 31, 2013 4:05 pm awwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwwww yeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee i remember watching 1.11 on Toonami earlier this year, 2.22 should be fun

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Jul 31, 2013 6:50 pm we’re proud to announce that we’ll be airing NEON GENESIS EVANGELION 2.22, YOU CAN [NOT] ADVANCE...

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed Jul 31, 2013 7:06 pm Jayfive wrote: Hmmm.....something 3.33 related I shouldn't wonder.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Aug 01, 2013 3:38 am Jayfive wrote: Hmmm.....something 3.33 related I shouldn't wonder.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Aug 02, 2013 11:08 am Glad to see that they'll be able to show Eva 2.22 at end of August rather than next year... but probably will not be able to see it anyway because, well, I've already seen it plenty of times! Maybe they're bringing NGE to the line up?

[]:             Quote Post by Excess_Velocity » Fri Aug 02, 2013 8:14 pm This means I get to watch it on a live stream with my buddies on the Chans, which will be fun

[]:             Quote Post by KingBungleHole » Sun Aug 04, 2013 3:01 pm Finally I can get my friends to watch 2.22 with me!

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Aug 25, 2013 12:39 am Trailer is up The Angels have [Not] Returned

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Aug 25, 2013 2:07 am This forum has enough driving into the ground of the whole "(not)" thing for one lifetime, Toonami doesn't need to get in on that action too.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Aug 25, 2013 3:14 am Can't believe I didn't think of that before.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Aug 25, 2013 3:47 am Ceej, at least the trailer-makers used the "(not)" correctly (unlike nearly all of the usages I see on this forum), because each of the sentences they used it in had meaning with or without the "not". E.g., the Angels have returned, and yet they have not returned because they never actually went anywhere (assuming that the backstory there is the same as in NGE, and sure, why wouldn't they jump to that conclusion?) (alternatively, the Angels have not returned because these are actually completely different Angels because this is a completely different story and not a sequel), or, this is the end of the world, and yet it is not the end of the world because in the next movie there are survivors, and so on. But unless there are rumors that the airing is getting cancelled or something like that, I don't see how a usage of "(not)" there is valid.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Aug 25, 2013 5:41 am You totally asked for it though.

[]:             Quote Post by ancapevageek » Sun Aug 25, 2013 11:06 am The promo dropped... and even though I've seen 2.22 100 times, it gets my hype for it. A really well done promo, for sure. @clarknova: Our Evangelion 2.22 promo: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DIDurvdZomU … #toonami

[]:             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Sun Aug 25, 2013 11:00 pm I went ahead and looked up how Comcast is describing 2.22 in the programing guide, because sometimes I get a good laugh out of those things. Here are a couple highlights in case anyone's interested: The film is listed as Evangelion 2.0 instead of 2.22, which is silly that they're misleading people that don't know any better, but I'm not too worried about it or mad at Toonami or Comcast or whoever writes these goofy film descriptions. It has Megumi Ogata as the voice of Shinji, although they're definitely showing the dubbed one. I got a good laugh out of that, since I prefer subbed Shinji. Mari is labeled as the new recruit from England, which I got a good laugh at too since I never would label one of the children as a "recruit," but maybe that's just me.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Mon Aug 26, 2013 2:23 pm Why were there mirrored scenes there? Rei charging at Zeruel with the missile for example...
